headline: Instagram is finally letting everyone reorganize their profile grid
summary: Instagram is widely rolling out the ability to rearrange posts on your profile grid. This feature was announced nearly a year ago and previously limited to test groups. It's now available on both Android and iPhone mobile apps.

headline: Apple’s Screen Time updates are too little, too late
summary: Apple surprisingly dedicated a significant portion of its WWDC keynote to Screen Time. Despite the airtime, few new features were announced beyond a redesigned interface. Most updates were minor improvements to existing options, drawing criticism.

headline: 5 things I already love from the iOS 27 beta
summary: The author has explored the iOS 27 developer beta on their iPhone 16 Pro shortly after its release. They are keen to try the new Siri AI but are currently on a waitlist for the feature. The article highlights five initial beloved features found within the new beta.

headline: Apple is using AI to fix Safari’s extension problem
summary: Apple is leveraging AI to address Safari's historical weakness in browser extensions. Safari has long lacked the robust library found in rival browsers due to stringent development rules. The new AI feature will allow users to essentially 'vibe-code' their own custom extensions.

headline: Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 Ports Have Apparently Leaked
summary: Reports indicate that Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 may be coming to modern platforms. Apparent leaks suggest these classic titles are being ported or remastered. This news hints at a potential return for the fan-favorite games.

headline: Helldivers Movie Loses Jason Momoa as Its Star
summary: Jason Momoa has exited the live-action Helldivers movie project. His departure leaves the lead role in the upcoming film adaptation vacant. No immediate reasons for Momoa's decision were provided.

headline: Halo: Campaign Evolved Collector's Edition Includes a Relic of a Bygone Gaming Era
summary: Halo: Campaign Evolved goes beyond merely remaking a 25-year-old game. Its Collector's Edition aims to revive the entire gaming era it originated from. The edition includes a unique 'relic' representing that bygone period.

headline: Xbox Says Gears of War: E-Day PS5 Port Was Not Pulled 'Last-Minute' After Art With PS5 Logo Leaks
summary: Xbox denies that a Gears of War: E-Day PS5 port was pulled at the last minute. This statement follows an accidental leak of game art featuring a PS5 logo. Xbox maintains that a PlayStation version was never officially planned.

headline: Billionaire West Ham co-owner accused of abusing his power and preying on women for sex
summary: David Sullivan, West Ham co-owner, faces serious accusations of abusing his power. Women allege he demanded sexual favors in exchange for features in his newspapers. These claims highlight potential widespread exploitative behavior.

headline: Who is David Sullivan - football boss, 'king of porn' and alleged sexual predator?
summary: David Sullivan, former West Ham boss, is now accused of exploitative behavior and being a sexual predator. He has a long public history of boasting about sexual conquests. The article delves into his past as a football boss and 'king of porn'.

headline: 'I was a prisoner in my home': Drug gangs 'cuckooing' hundreds of homes a week, police warn
summary: Police warn that drug gangs are 'cuckooing' hundreds of homes across the UK weekly. 'Cuckooing' involves criminals taking over vulnerable individuals' homes to establish drug dealing bases. Victims describe feeling imprisoned and helpless in their own residences.

headline: Iran and Israel say they will pause strikes but warn of retaliation if ceasefire breached again
summary: Iran and Israel have both announced a pause in their military strikes. Israel's PM stated his country is 'holding fire at the moment,' confirming Iran's cessation of military action. Both nations issued warnings of retaliation should the ceasefire be breached again.
